'''鈭歱-w-b-b''' ('''kapawbeboko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:macadamise|macadamise]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| p-w-b-b
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:macadamise|macadamise]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歱-w-b-b
|-
! Lemma
| kapawbeboko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thipawbeboko|thipawbeboko]] || [[word:jipawbeboko|jipawbeboko]] || [[word:shipawbeboko|shipawbeboko]] || [[word:kipawbeboko|kipawbeboko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
